array_types.name: Joint_Pointers
array_types.code:
type Joint_Pointers is
  array
    (Interfaces.C
       .size_t range <>) of aliased bullet_c.Pointers.Joint_Pointer;

array_types.name: Object_Pointers
array_types.code:
type Object_Pointers is
  array
    (Interfaces.C
       .size_t range <>) of aliased bullet_c.Pointers.Object_Pointer;

array_types.name: Shape_Pointers
array_types.code:
type Shape_Pointers is
  array
    (Interfaces.C
       .size_t range <>) of aliased bullet_c.Pointers.Shape_Pointer;

array_types.name: Space_Pointers
array_types.code:
type Space_Pointers is
  array
    (Interfaces.C
       .size_t range <>) of aliased bullet_c.Pointers.Space_Pointer;

access_types.name: Joint_Pointer
access_types.code: type Joint_Pointer is access all bullet_c.Joint;

access_types.name: Object_Pointer
access_types.code: type Object_Pointer is access all bullet_c.Object;

access_types.name: Shape_Pointer
access_types.code: type Shape_Pointer is access all bullet_c.Shape;

access_types.name: Space_Pointer
access_types.code: type Space_Pointer is access all bullet_c.Space;
